title: Projects
selectCompany: Select a company to view projects.

newProjectDialog.codebaseHint: Add a repo and/or local folder for this project.
newProjectDialog.codebaseBothHint: Configure both repo and local folder.

properties.name: Name
properties.workspacesHelp: Workspaces give your agents hints about where the work is
properties.archiveDescription: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
properties.unarchiveDescription: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.
properties.localFolderAbsolutePathError: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
properties.repoUrlInvalidError: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
properties.envHelp: Applied to all runs for issues in this project. Project values override agent env on key conflicts.
properties.legacyWorkspaceNotice: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. Paperclip is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.
